title: [Allergic rhinitis and its impact on asthma update (ARIA 2008). The Turkish perspective].
author_string: Yorgancioğlu, Arzu, Kalayci, Omer, Kalyoncu, A Fuat, Khaltaev, Nikolai, Bousquet, Jean
abstract: In this article, it is aimed to summarize the newly updated and published version of "Allergic Rhinitis and its Impact on Asthma (ARIA) 2008" and add the recent Turkish epidemiological data on it.
